title: Debug and fix persistent admin access denial for authenticated owner

requirements.summary: Add comprehensive frontend console logging in the admin route to diagnose admin access denial issues
acceptanceCriteria: Admin route logs the isAdmin value and its type
Admin route logs explicit boolean comparison results
Admin route logs any errors from the backend call
Logs appear in browser console when accessing /admin route

file_operations.description: Add extensive console logging in the admin route protection logic to output: 1) the exact isAdmin boolean value returned from the backend call, 2) the type of the isAdmin value using typeof operator, 3) the results of explicit boolean checks (isAdmin === true, isAdmin === false), 4) any error objects if the backend call fails. Include timestamps and clear labels for each log entry to facilitate debugging of the persistent access denial issue.

Enhance the existing debug logging in useIsOwner hook to include: 1) the raw response from the isCallerAdmin backend method before any processing, 2) detailed type information about the response, 3) step-by-step boolean conversion logging if any conversions occur, 4) caught error details with stack traces. Add console.group/groupEnd for organized log output in the browser console.
